latestIgtvVideos.caption:
6,760,161 runners.

189 countries worldwide.
 
One common goal.

Because of you, 250.000 kg/500,000 lbs of plastic waste will be cleaned up by @parley.tv’s Global Clean Up Network to help end plastic waste.

Proving that together, #impossibleisnothing.

#RunForTheOceans

We’ve all got reasons to help end plastic waste. But it’s when we come together that achieving it becomes possible.

Join @adidas @parley.tv and countless others from around the globe to Run For The Oceans today until June 8th by clicking the link in our bio 🌊🤍

#RunForTheOceans #adidasParley #ImpossibleIsNothing

The future is up to us.

We all have our reasons to save our planet. We do it for our homes, our families, for the next generation. 

Now is the time to Run For The Oceans to take action and help end plastic waste.

Sign up today and participate from May 23rd using the link in our bio. 

Together, impossible is nothing. 

#RunForTheOceans #adidasParley #ImpossibleIsNothing

“I’ve seen first-hand what plastic waste is doing to our beaches.” 

…and it isn’t pretty.

See why @pedri is joining the global movement from May 23rd to preserve the planet, and help take the next step to help end plastic waste using the link in our bio. 

Together, impossible is nothing.

@parley.tv 

#RunForTheOceans #adidasParley #ImpossibleIsNothing

“This isn’t an island problem, it is a world problem. It needs the world to do something about it”  

Reliance on our oceans keeps @hey_itsshaunae fighting for marine life.  

It takes us, too. Run For The Oceans from May 23rd to help end plastic waste. Link in bio to learn more. 

Together, impossible is nothing.

@parley.tv

#RunForTheOceans #adidasParley #impossibleisnothing

”I feel humbled every time I’m near the ocean. It makes me want to protect it and fight for it even more.” @domithiem 

We have a responsibility to save the oceans who give us life.

Join us and @parley.tv as we Run For The Oceans starting May 23rd to help end plastic waste.

Together, impossible is nothing. 

#RunForTheOceans #adidasParley #ImpossibleIsNothing

Impossible? Where’s the fun in that? 😏

#ImpossibleIsNothing

This is for all women.​

The ones who have paved the way for our generation to do the impossible

and those who continue to do so for generations to come.​

I’m possible, because she’s possible.​

#ImpossibleIsNothing #InternationalWomensDay

If you want to be on top of the podium, you have to be willing to put in the work. 

“My story is not impossible. Because I’m possible” 

@momiji_nishiya830 

#ImpossibleIsNothing

”So who’s going to tell me I’m not an athlete?​

My story is not impossible. Because I’m possible.”​

@mynameisjessamyn 

#ImpossibleIsNothing

“I am Fatima Ibrahimi. ​

I'm a runner no matter where I am. ​

Where I am from, I ran past the hate. ​

I ran past the yells, and the threats. ​

They didn't just fear me. ​

They feared what I was running for: women everywhere. ​

My story is not impossible. Because I'm possible.”​

#ImpossibleIsNothing​

latestPosts.caption:
Mikaela Shiffrin takes the Overall Crystal Globe in Hafjell 🔮

110 World Cup wins, an Olympic slalom gold in Milano Cortina and a season that set the standard 🎿

Nine wins from ten in slalom, 980 points from a possible 1000 and a record ninth Slalom Globe.

She closes it in the final Giant Slalom, right where it had to be done.

#YouGotThis
